content.thinking:
Now I understand the current state. I need to:
1. Enable OpenTelemetry in the ingress-nginx controller configuration
2. Configure sampling to 100%
3. Update the access log format to include trace and span IDs

The ingress-nginx configmap currently only has `limit-req-status-code: "429"`. I need to add the OpenTelemetry settings.

Let me check the ingress-nginx controller version to confirm OTel support.

content.text: Now I'll patch the ingress-nginx ConfigMap to enable OpenTelemetry with 100% sampling and the required log format.

input.description: Patch ingress-nginx ConfigMap to enable OTel and set log format

content.text: The ConfigMap is patched. Now I need to restart the controller to pick up the changes, then verify it reloaded.

input.description: Restart ingress-nginx controller to apply config changes
Wait for ingress-nginx controller rollout to complete
